name: The Tatone Zone
overview: A late-night movie television show hosted by Steve Tatone, Steve Kirk and Denise Tatone. The program ran old movies and featured segments with the hosts during the breaks. Steve Tatone and Denise Tatone both managed car dealerships and Steve Kirk was the spokesman for the Bob Tatone dealership at the time. Ran on WDTN-TV 2 in Dayton, Ohio in 1987
